Memory Pager · 디자인 디렉션

같은 앱, 완전히 다른 10가지 디자인

커플 전용 메모리 앱 “Memory Pager”를, 정보 구조는 그대로 두고 열 가지 완전히 다른 비주얼·UX 방향으로 구현했습니다. 각 방향마다 핵심 히어로 화면 3개(낙서 보내기 · 펫 키우기 · 사진첩)를 실제 Flutter로 렌더한 결과입니다.

10 directions3 hero screens each 30 real Flutter rendersweb build · 428×926

추천 요약 · Where to start

For a 2-person team, weigh emotional fit against build budget. Three standouts: (1) Quiet Signal (07) is the low-risk foundation — cheapest and fastest to ship, timeless, accessible, with a haptic layer that adds quiet magic; start here if you want to launch and iterate. (2) Washi Scrapbook (05) is the best on-theme, broad-appeal pick — its live co-arrangement is a true togetherness feature and the collage warmth suits a shared memory book, at the cost of a real co-editing/layout build. (3) Darkroom (10) is the boldest differentiator: the 'only develops when both of you rub it' mechanic is an original intimacy hook uniquely aligned with a couples product — take it only if you can accept the dark-palette accessibility tradeoff and add a graceful fallback for an inactive partner. Note that Clay Room (03) is the dream engagement play but is almost certainly over-scoped for two people; treat it as a v2 north star, not a v1. Practical path: ship Quiet Signal's calm structure first, then layer in one signature hook (Washi's co-editing or Darkroom's shared reveal) as the differentiator once the core loop is proven.

07 Quiet Signal · 안전한 출발점 05 Washi Scrapbook · 주제 적합·협업 킬러 10 Darkroom · 가장 대담한 차별화
화면
01

PAGER-9000

Brutalist Terminal ☾ dark 빌드 Low

Brutalist black-and-phosphor terminal where every memory is an incoming page.

✦ A fat physical SEND PAGE button with a ka-chunk haptic; doodles transmit as a dot-matrix wipe that reassembles pixel-by-pixel.

  • Instantly ownable, unmistakable identity that literally fits the app name (a 'pager')
  • Cheapest possible build: flat, zero-radius, system monospace, no 3D or asset pipeline
  • The page/transmit metaphor makes 'send a memory' feel like a deliberate event
  • High-contrast retro-tech reads cold and harsh, at odds with intimate memory-sharing
  • Strong niche taste; can alienate a partner who isn't into ironic gadget aesthetics

적합 Tech-forward couples/friends who want a playful, ironic retro-gadget vibe.

02

Frosted Locket

Glassmorphism ☀ light 빌드 High

Translucent glass panels floating over a dawn-to-dusk gradient, like a locket you peer into.

✦ Tilt-to-peek gyroscope parallax slides the frosted top layer so today's photo bleeds through the glass beneath.

  • Premium, on-trend (Liquid Glass / glassmorphism 2026) feel that signals quality
  • The 'locket' metaphor is emotionally warm and perfectly suits a keepsake
  • Layered depth makes even sparse content look rich
  • Glassmorphism is GPU/perf heavy and a real contrast/accessibility risk over photos
  • Gyro parallax is fiddly to tune and undiscoverable without onboarding

적합 A premium keepsake app for couples who want an ethereal, high-end feel.

03

Clay Room

3D Claymorphism ☀ light 빌드 Very High

A tiny isometric 3D room the shared pet actually lives in, in soft-extruded clay.

✦ Two-finger spin rotates the diorama in real 3D; the pet follows your finger, photos hang on the walls, and furniture appears as it grows.

  • Highest delight and retention hook: a living, growing space to return to daily
  • Strong pet-raising loop that ties memories to a persistent world
  • Extremely photogenic and shareable
  • By far the heaviest build for a 2-person team: real 3D, assets, physics, growth states
  • High scope-creep and maintenance risk that can swallow the whole roadmap

적합 A gamified pet-raising couples app willing to invest in a living-world centerpiece.

04

Riso Pulse

Risograph Print ☀ light 빌드 Low

A two-ink risograph zine: fluoro pink over electric blue with grain and misregistration.

✦ Shake-to-shuffle re-lays the album into a fresh randomized zine spread, ink misregister animating and settling so no two look alike.

  • Bold, scroll-stopping identity that stands out in a sea of soft pastel apps
  • Cheap to build with flat art plus grain/overprint filters
  • Randomized spreads keep the album feeling alive and re-openable
  • Loud two-ink palette fatigues over daily use and can bury the actual photos
  • Low contrast and heavy grain create legibility/accessibility problems

적합 Indie, creative, younger users who want an expressive printed-zine aesthetic.

05

Washi Scrapbook추천

Paper Collage ☀ light 빌드 High

A maximalist cut-paper collage album with torn edges, washi tape, and taped-down polaroids.

✦ Tape-it-down: drag a photo to an edge and it snaps under washi tape; both partners co-arrange the same live page, each shown as a little paper cursor.

  • Warm, handmade, and deeply on-theme for a shared memory book
  • Real-time co-arrangement is a genuine togetherness killer feature
  • Broad, cross-demographic appeal (journaling is mainstream in 2026)
  • Live co-editing plus a freeform collage layout engine is a meaningful build
  • Maximalism can read as cluttered and cramped on small phone screens

적합 Couples/friends who want a warm, collaborative, journaling-style memory book.

06

Felt & Fluff

Craft / Felt ☀ light 빌드 High

A hand-sewn felt world where the shared pet is a squeezable plushie you both raise.

✦ Squish the pet with springy haptics; pat-to-feed buzzes your partner too, and growth visibly stuffs it rounder with new stitched accessories.

  • Extremely cute and cozy with a strong emotional pull
  • Shared haptic pet-care (feeding buzzes the partner) creates real felt intimacy
  • Distinctive tactile identity that's hard to confuse with anything else
  • Custom felt illustration is art-heavy to produce and scale across states
  • Kawaii skews niche and can feel childish to some couples

적합 Kawaii-loving couples who want a soft, cuddly, shared-pet experience.

07

Quiet Signal추천

Calm Minimal ☀ light 빌드 Low

Low-stimulus warm-paper calm: one strong memory per screen, one blinking pager cursor.

✦ Every gesture has a distinct haptic voice: one buzz for a received memory, a soft double-tap when your partner is doodling right now.

  • Calm, timeless, and ages well; the safest long-term aesthetic bet
  • Fastest and cheapest to build, and the most accessible/legible
  • The per-gesture haptic layer adds quiet magic with almost no visual cost
  • Minimalism can read as plain/undifferentiated in a crowded store
  • Few viral or shareable hooks to drive organic growth

적합 Users who want a quiet, intentional daily ritual over gamified flair.

08

Memory Bento

Bento Grid ☀ light 빌드 Medium

The album as an asymmetric bento grid of photo, doodle, mood chip, and voice tiles.

✦ Each day compacts into one bento tile; pinch to zoom out across months as the grid reflows, and long-press pins a favorite to a larger cell.

  • Scales gracefully as content accumulates over months and years
  • Familiar, tidy, versatile pattern that handles mixed media cleanly
  • Moderate, well-understood build with no exotic tech
  • Grid can feel generic and utilitarian, with a weak emotional signature
  • Getting the auto-layout/reflow to feel intentional is nontrivial tuning

적합 A content-dense product for organized users who value clean browsing over character.

09

Mixtape

Skeuomorphic ☾ dark 빌드 High

A warm 70s cassette with spinning reels, VU meters, and a felt-pen J-card.

✦ Drag a reel to scrub through days; press REC to record a doodle onto Side B for your partner, and the take-up reel visibly winds fuller as memories accumulate.

  • Rich nostalgic metaphor with a strong 'make my partner a tape' gift hook
  • The filling take-up reel is a lovely, tangible progress/growth signal
  • Memorable and emotionally romantic
  • The cassette metaphor may not land with younger users who never used one
  • Skeuomorphic reels/warble are animation- and asset-heavy to do convincingly

적합 Nostalgic couples who love the romance of making each other a tape.

10

Darkroom추천

Cinematic Film ☾ dark 빌드 Medium

A red-safelight film lab where every photo arrives undeveloped on sprocket rails.

✦ Rub a blank frame with your thumb and the image blooms in over ~8 seconds, but it only fully develops once your partner rubs it too, a shared-warmth reveal.

  • The mutual-develop mechanic is a genuinely original intimacy hook unique to a 2-person product
  • Moody, distinctive, and highly memorable
  • The reveal ritual makes each new photo feel earned
  • Dark, red-heavy palette is fatiguing and low-contrast for daily viewing/accessibility
  • Gating content behind the partner's action frustrates when one person is inactive

적합 An intimate two-person app that wants a ritualized, deliberate reveal.

실제로 만져보기

이 10개는 목업이 아니라 실행되는 Flutter 앱입니다. 프로젝트 루트에서 flutter run -d chrome 를 실행하면 갤러리가 뜨고, 좌측에서 디자인을, 상단에서 화면을 전환하며 인터랙션(펫 쓰다듬기, 모드 토글 등)까지 직접 확인할 수 있습니다. 특정 화면만 보려면 ?d=07&s=petHome&solo=1 처럼 딥링크도 됩니다. 마음에 드는 방향을 고르시면, 그 하나를 iOS/Android로 빌드해 실제 제품으로 발전시킵니다.
